Document:
# GRANDQUEEN-CLASS CRUSIELINER
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Large
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 4-5
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"A Large sized vessel for Cruise lining or various social transport."
"Manufactured by BAM, Big Aim Machineries."
# Setting up your sauna
go to the air alarm and set the scrubbers to scrub nitrogen above 70 and water vapor above 15 and oxygen above 18. after that turn on your mixer.
# Chef

# Piloting

[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
